steps.title: Pick two points on the line
steps.content: The line of best fit slopes downward, so the slope must be negative. Two clear points on the line are approximately $(0,12)$ and $(8,6)$.

steps.title: Compute the slope
steps.content:
Use change in $y$ over change in $x$.
$$\frac{6-12}{8-0}=\frac{-6}{8}=-0.75$$

steps.title: Match the closest choice
steps.content: The closest listed value to $-0.75$ is $-0.73$. The positive choices have the wrong sign, and $-12.14$ is much too steep. The answer is C.
